message: Oh, do you still need something?
Whether this room is too plain for a big-time actress, or if it's simply elegantly arranged.
Right in front of me is a famous actress, lying there provocatively, yet I'm not that excited. She seems like she could be dangerous.
probably a second home. Is her real house in Beverly Hills or maybe Miami?
She seems all jittery, like a teenage girl waiting for her first date tomorrow.
Apparently, she's satisfied with my work. It's scary to anger a woman like that.
Hey, what kind of clothes do you think I should wear?
I have no sense, so I can't be of help.
Yeah, it doesn't make sense to talk to you about this.
I'm more nervous than winning an Academy Award, what should I do? My heart is racing.
Please, don't do anything to upset her mood.
I know I'm going to meet you, and I'm not that busy.
Really? Then I'll leave it to you.
Honestly, I want to meet right away.
But both my daughter and I need to mentally prepare.
With this, I can calm down and do my best in the shoot. But, could it end up making me distracted and mess things up?
That would be a problem. Please be careful.
Oh come on, there's no way I'm going to mess up. Just kidding, just kidding.
I can't sacrifice my work for any more private matters.
I just hope I don’t get too carried away just because the date to meet my daughter is set. I just hope I won't get hit with rotten tomatoes at the art museum.
Anyway, I'll do my best to
fit her wishes. After all, she's an important client.
I’ve been so bored, so it’s no problem to get Cindy to agree on a place and time.
It’d be better to get them together before Cindy changes her mind.
